pi_items.metadata_value: Based on Simon Brown's C4 model example
pi_items.verified_value: Based on Simon Brown's C4 model Big Bank plc example
pi_items.source: C4 model created by Simon Brown; Big Bank plc is official example in Structurizr documentation (structurizr.com, c4model.com, GitHub Structurizr examples)

privileged_info_summary: The C4 banking architecture task is based on Simon Brown's real, well-documented C4 model Big Bank plc example. All four context entities (Personal Banking Customer, Internet Banking System, Mainframe Banking System, E-mail System) and all four container entities (Single-Page Application, Web Application, API Application, Database) are verified to match the official C4 model Internet Banking System example. All required relationship terms (views account, makes payments, sends e-mail, reads from, writes to) appear in standard C4 model documentation. The two required pages (System Context and Container) are standard C4 model page names. The specification document, draw.io file, and PDF export are synthetic task artifacts, but their content and structure are based on the verified real C4 model example. draw.io version 26.0.9 is a legitimate desktop release.
